title: Minted Peas
excerpt: Ingredients 4-6 large handfuls frozen peas 1 small bunch fresh mint salt and freshly ground black pepper lemon juice to taste 100 ml olive oil Method Place the peas in a cold pan and place the bunch of fresh mint on top of the peas. html:
Ingredients

  • 4-6 large handfuls frozen peas
  • 1 small bunch fresh mint
  • salt and freshly ground black pepper
  • lemon juice to taste
  • 100 ml olive oil

Method

Place the peas in a cold pan and place the bunch of fresh mint on top of the peas.

Boil a kettle full of water and pour just enough boiling water over the peas and mint so that everything is covered by water. Put the lid on and cook on high until the peas are just soft – just a few minutes.

Drain immediately and place the peas and mint in a mixing bowl. Season with salt and pepper and add the lemon juice and olive oil. Mash or place in a food processor until all the peas have broken up coarsely.

Easy!
